$comment: Reviewer-authored closed membership for every manifest-public first-party runtime export and module initializer. New packages, subpaths, value exports, condition arms, or manifest targets fail the gate until explicitly classified. SPEC.md §6.6.

emptyPublicPackages.reason: public-packages.json declares no app-facing public subpaths
